articles.title: Trump Says Imported Generic Drugs To Face 100% Tariff From August 2028
articles.description: US President Donald Trump announced on Tuesday the imposition of steep tariffs on imported generic drugs from August 2028, a move he said was aimed at onshoring production of such pharmaceutical products.

articles.title: Outbound portability of medical scheme benefits Rajasthan’s patients

articles.title: Uttar Pradesh cabinet approves free scooty scheme for college girls
articles.description: The scheme will play a significant role in ensuring easier access to higher education for girl students while making them self-reliant and confident, said the State government. articles.title: Clean energy push is India’s answer to transition challenges: UN climate chief

articles.title: Karnataka High Court seeks State’s response on plea seeking CBI probe into ‘illegalities’ in KPSC recruitments

Sahukar, suspended chairperson.
